caption: Navigable diagram of [Tolkien's legendarium](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tolkien%27s_legendarium). The Lord of the Rings began as a sequel to The Hobbit but gradually took in elements of the legendarium, the mythology summarized in [The Silmarillion](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Silmarillion).
alt: Diagram of the documents comprising Tolkien's Legendarium, as interpreted very strictly, strictly, or more broadly
